intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered — LOWER band of the 65-72 m² floor range, NO CARPORT. 12x12 lot gives an 8x8 envelope = 64 m² floor (clean rectangle, no L-cut). Master ensuite + common bath share a wet-core plumbing wall; bath block sits between master (front) and standard (rear). Open-plan great room + kitchen.
must_haves: common bath publicly accessible from great room
clustered baths (ensuite + common share a plumbing wall)
